name: emergency-route-check
description: Route to 111/105/Healthline/FENZ/Health NZ official channels — not emergency response

steps.text: If life/safety threat or unclear emergency: Call 111 first. Skill emergency-services-agent.

steps.goal: Using skill emergency-services-agent and knowledge/public-safety/emergency-services-framework.md plus nz-police-105.md, fenz-incident-reports.md, and knowledge/health/healthnz-find-a-service.md as relevant, produce: (1) primary action first (111/105/Healthline/official URL) (2) one-sentence why (3) secondary steps only after primary (4) official links (5) privacy note if HTML stack mentioned (6) explicit non-claims. Never discourage 111 when urgency is unclear. Do not invent wait times or take reports.
criteria: Primary action is 111 when urgency unclear or emergency language present
FENZ or Health NZ referenced only when in scope
No invented phone numbers beyond 111/105 published patterns
No collection of incident PII into recommendations
